SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCGARRY, MAIREAD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN, TOM $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,350.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
